dublinCore.dc:title: 119 SRES 553 IS: Recognizing that climate change is real.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Whitehouse (for himself, Mr. Merkley, Mr. Schatz, Mr. Markey, Mr. Van Hollen, Ms. Duckworth, Mr. Padilla, Mr. Welch, and Ms. Blunt Rochester) submitted the following resolution; which was referred to the Committee on Environment and Public Works

form.official-title: Recognizing that climate change is real.

whereas.text: Whereas changes in the climate caused by fossil fuel emissions are proven by decades of sound science and are not a hoax: Now, therefore, be it

section.text: That the Senate recognizes that climate change is real.
